# Images

Responsive images with standardized aspect ratios, figure elements with captions, SVG icons, and Font Awesome icons.

## Interactive Preview

<div className="sb-contained-canvas">
  <Canvas of={ImagesStories.Interactive} />
</div>
<Controls of={ImagesStories.Interactive} />

## Aspect Ratios

These are the aspect ratios used for programmatic image cropping across components that require a consistent crop.

- 16:9
- 3:2
- 1:1
- 1:1.6
- 4:3
